label: Quarantine Stores
description: Quarantine Stores is a narrow, pressure-rated storage cell recessed behind void-black adamantine ribs, its seams caulked and riveted to preserve the habitation suite’s seal integrity. Wall-to-wall ration bins and standardized munitorum crates occupy steel shelving that is numbered and stenciled with contamination-control codes. Armored lumen strips behind grilles cast hard light across scoured decking and a grated sump channel for washdown runoff. A compact auspex-locked cabinet and tally-board mount near the threshold, reflecting Cyrenth Bastion-City’s inventory discipline under siege protocol.
